flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Lively Technical College fell 31% between 2021 and 2024 (46.0% → 31.5%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Lively Technical College fell 28% between 2006 and 2009 (49.4% → 35.8%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Lively Technical College rose 22% between 2000 and 2003 ($1.9k → $2.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Lively Technical College rose 21% between 2000 and 2003 ($7.5k → $9.2k).
